text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
In Team Trials, you race against teams of
runners carefully assembled by other
trainers!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
All right, Trainer. Let's try making a team
with some Veteran Umamusume who
have finished their careers!
